name: lighthouse-automation-template
description: Automation template with Puppeteer, POM and Lighthouse User Flows

scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:reports && npm run clean:logs
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build && cross-env MODO=desktop node dist/index.js
scripts.test:tablet: npm run build && cross-env MODO=tablet node dist/index.js
scripts.test:mobile: npm run build && cross-env MODO=mobile node dist/index.js
scripts.test:all: npm run build && cross-env MODO=all node dist/index.js
